title: Songwriter Notebook song
description: A saved song: an ordered list of captured chord progressions plus lyrics and metadata. Captured progressions are FIXED SNAPSHOTS — each chord's name + notes are frozen at capture time and never re-derived — with provenance (which feel/key it came from) and a presets-only section label. Songs are user content stored per-device in localStorage (key sn_songs); there are no built-in song files, so this schema is documentation/editor-validation only and is NOT fetched at runtime (js/songs.js validateSong mirrors it). Forward-compatible: future per-song or per-progression fields (tempo, time signature, tags) may be added without breaking older records.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema (for editor validation), e.g. "./song.schema.json".

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this file targets. 1 = initial song record.

id.description: Unique slug; also the picker value and the key within sn_songs. Assigned once at first save (default untitledNNN); stable across renames.

name.description: Display name shown in the song picker. Defaults to untitledNNN; editable via Save (first save) and Rename.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the song was first created.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last change.

lyrics.description: Free-form lyrics / notes. May be empty.

title.description: The generator section title at capture (e.g. "Main Progression", "Dominant · G major", "Bridge").

chords.description: Frozen snapshot of the progression's chords. Never re-derived.

notes.description: Spelled note names of the voicing, e.g. ["C","E","G"].

provenance.description: Where the snapshot came from (display / traceability only).

keyLabel.description: The captured progression's own key, e.g. "C major" or (chromatic) "C".
